message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
  ActorBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  LifeLineBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  LifeLineBackgroundColor White
}

actor "Program" as Program
participant "V4L2" as V4L2
participant "Bridge CX3" as BridgeCX3
participant "Camera OV5640" as CameraOV5640

box "Initialization" #LightGray
  Program -> V4L2: 1 OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 2
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 3
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 4
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 5
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 6
  deactivate V4L2
  
  Program -> V4L2: 7 InitDevice()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 8
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 9
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 10
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 11
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 12
  deactivate V4L2
end box

box "Test" #LightGray
  Program -> V4L2: 13 SetParameter(valueA)
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 14 valueA
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 15 valueA
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 16
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 17
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 18
  deactivate V4L2
  
  Program -> V4L2: 19 GetParameter()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 20
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 21
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 22 value
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 23 value
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 24 value
  deactivate V4L2
  note left of Program: value must be equal to ValueA
  
  Program -> V4L2: 25 StartStream()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 26
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 27
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 28
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 29
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 30
  deactivate V4L2
  
  Program -> V4L2: 31 GetParameter()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 32
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 33
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 34 value
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 35 value
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 36 value
  deactivate V4L2
  note left of Program: value must be equal to ValueA
  
  Program -> V4L2: 37 SetParameter(valueB)
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 38 valueB
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 39 valueB
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 40
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 41
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 42
  deactivate V4L2
  
  Program -> V4L2: 43 GetParameter()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 44
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 45
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 46 value
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 47 value
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 48 value
  deactivate V4L2
  note left of Program: value must be equal to ValueB
  
  Program -> V4L2: 49 StopStream()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 50
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 51
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 52
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 53
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 54
  deactivate V4L2
  
  Program -> V4L2: 55 GetParameter()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 56
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 57
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 58 value
  deactivate CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 59 value
  deactivate BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 60 value
  deactivate V4L2
  note left of Program: value must be equal to ValueB
end box

box "Destruction" #LightGray
  Program -> V4L2: 61 CloseDevice()
  activate V4L2
  V4L2 -> BridgeCX3: 62
  activate BridgeCX3
  BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640: 63
  activate CameraOV5640
  CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3: 64
  destroy CameraOV5640
  BridgeCX3 --> V4L2: 65
  destroy BridgeCX3
  V4L2 --> Program: 66
  destroy V4L2
  destroy Program
end box
@enduml
```
